name: Kaimuki Shokudo
tagline: Izakaya menu that actually runs late — Kaimuki residents' answer to where to eat at 11pm on a Saturday.
mustOrder: Garlic fried chicken — crispy, juicy, and perfect with a beer
Pork belly bao buns — rich and savory late-night fuel
Shoyu ramen — solid bowl to close out the night
parking: Street parking on Waialae Ave, side streets have more options
talkStory: Part of the Kaimuki dining revival, Shokudo brought a modern izakaya concept to Waialae Ave with late-night hours that the neighborhood desperately needed — filling the gap for quality food after 10pm. Sun–Thu until midnight, Fri–Sat until 1am. The late-night happy hour deals are the move. Sit at the bar for faster service. The small plates are meant for sharing — order several and split with the table.
